1) **Restart/build status:** ✅ Manual restart for **“Telegram /restart”** is complete. The gateway booted successfully, and **Telegram polling has resumed**. No files were changed in this restart, so no new build step was required (latest Telegram image-intake changes were already build-verified earlier with `npm run build` / `tsc` passing).

2) **What changed (high-level):** This was a runtime/session refresh only—no code edits, no config changes, and no API-surface changes during this restart.

3) **What should I verify next?** I can now validate any of these live: Telegram command handling (`/new`, `/clear`, `/model`), inbound image intake path, or end-to-end message roundtrip health.
